hero.title: Moving company to and from Poland – Warsaw, Kraków, Wrocław, Gdańsk and beyond
hero.subtitle: We help Swedish families and businesses move to Poland and Polish customers move to Sweden. Our routine with longer transport distances, Polish property structures with older blokki and modern areas, and coordination with Polish property managers means the move works even when Polish regulations and differences in housing market put higher demands on planning.

features.title: What benefits do you get with Flyttella for moves to/from Poland?

about.title: About Flyttella for moves to and from Poland
about.desktop: Flyttella has been operating for over 8 years and helped 8,000 customers with moves in the Stockholm area and internationally. For Poland we have specialized in longer transport distances where driving times and costs are affected, Polish property structures with older blokki from the 1950s-70s where elevators are often small or missing, and modern areas in Warsaw and Kraków where rules and routines may differ from older properties.
about.desktop2: We plan driving routes with consideration for longer distances, coordinate with Polish property managers who may have different routines than Swedish ones, and ensure all communication happens in Polish where needed. Every move includes complimentary box loans, free rescheduling up to 24 hours before and a 14-day cleaning guarantee. Support gives advice on longer transport distances, Polish property regulations and differences in housing structure between Sweden and Poland.
about.mobile: Specialized teams for Poland who know longer distances, Polish property structures and housing market.
about.mobileExpanded: We handle longer transport distances, older blokki with narrow stairs, modern areas and Polish property regulations so the move works despite challenges.
about.mobileExpanded2: One point of contact follows you from quote to move-in and helps with questions on Polish property regulations, property managers and how to navigate differences in housing structure.

experienceSection.title: Our experience with moves to and from Poland

experience.title: Our experience with moves to and from Poland
experience.description: We regularly move between Sweden and Poland – from apartments in Stockholm to homes in Warsaw, Kraków, Wrocław and Gdańsk. Our experience with longer transport distances, Polish property structures with older blokki and modern areas, and differences in housing market and regulations means we can plan each move around distance, transport times and local conditions in both Swedish and Polish cities.
experience.expanded: For larger projects we often do digital or on-site reviews of both the Swedish and Polish addresses. We assess carry routes in older blokki with narrow stairs and limited elevators, modern areas in Warsaw and Kraków where rules may differ, and loading zones near city centres where parking can be challenging. Experience from moves to everything from apartments in older blokki to modern apartments in new areas means we know how much time is needed when longer distances, Polish property regulations and differences in housing structure affect the driving plan.

reviews.subtitle: Most recommended mover for moves to/from Poland
reviews.description: Customers who have moved to or from Poland often highlight how we handled the combination of longer transport distances, Polish property structures and differences in housing market without losing control. Families who moved to Warsaw tell how we coordinated with Polish property managers in good time, planned driving routes with consideration for longer distances and aligned times with both neighbors and property owners. Customers who moved to Kraków and Wrocław particularly value that we were clear about the driving plan despite longer distances, how Polish property regulations affect move-in, and that we kept our promised time windows despite longer transport distances.

awards.title: Flyttella awards for moves to and from Poland
awards.description: Our awards related to Poland often involve assignments where many moving parts must work simultaneously: departure from Sweden, driving over longer distances, arrival in a Polish city with different property structures, and move-in at a property where both timing and consideration for Polish regulations are crucial. Partners especially highlight our ability to deliver on the minute to addresses in, for example, Warsaw's city centre or Kraków's older areas, despite passing longer distances and handling differences in property structure along the way. That we manage this without damage to either belongings or properties despite longer transport distances is an important reason for the awards we have received on the Poland route.

servicesSection.title: Discover all our services for moves to/from Poland
servicesSection.description: Household moves between Sweden and Poland, packing, storage, cleaning, assembly and advisory services for cross-border moves. We handle driving plans over longer distances, account for Polish property structures, plan around Polish regulations and manage logistics at both Swedish and Polish addresses.

blogSection.title: Guides and tips for moving to/from Poland
blogSection.description: Plan your move around driving routes over longer distances, review Polish property structures, clarify in advance how elevators, stairwells and Polish property routines work in your specific property.

blog.title: Checklist: moving to/from Poland
blog.description: Review transport route over longer distances, ensure Polish property regulations are known, check rules for Polish properties with older blokki or modern areas before move day.

processSection.title: Our process
processSection.subtitle: How it works
processSection.description: Our moving process is simple, transparent and safe: fill out the form, get a quote within a minute, get personal follow-up the same day and sign digitally when everything feels right. The quote is based on your actual conditions – distance, longer transport distances, living area, floors, elevator and parking distance – and can be supplemented with packing, cleaning or storage without hidden fees.

process.fillFormDesc: Describe addresses in Sweden and Poland, date, floors, elevator rules, parking and if basement/attic should be emptied. Specify desired additional services and whether the move is over longer distances.
process.quickQuoteDesc: You get a fixed quote with clear scope where longer transport distances, distance and any Polish property structures are included. If inspection of the Polish address or check of property regulations is needed we book it before finalizing the price.
process.signConfirmDesc: After signing we prepare a detailed driving plan over longer distances, ensure Polish property regulations are known and ensure loading and unloading times fit both Swedish and Polish conditions.
process.personalContactDesc: Your coordinator keeps you updated on timings, longer transport distances and gives tips on how to prepare belongings for move-in at Polish properties with their specific regulations and structures.
process.moveCompletedDesc: The team protects entrances, stairs and elevators in both older blokki and modern buildings, adjusts carry routes to Polish property structures and makes sure your belongings end up in the right place in your new home in Poland or Sweden.
process.satisfiedCustomerDesc: We do a joint walkthrough, adjust furniture placement and ensure any follow-up services such as cleaning or storage follow the plan.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about moving to/from Poland

items.question: How do longer distances affect my move to Poland?
items.answer: Poland is further away than Denmark and Norway, which affects transport times and costs. We plan driving routes with consideration for longer distances and ensure the schedule is realistic. You get clear information on how this affects the schedule and price.

items.question: Do I need to think about differences in Polish property regulations?
items.answer: Yes, Polish property structures can differ from Swedish ones, especially in older blokki. We include Polish property regulations in the quote and explain how move-in works. You get a clear overview of what is included and how we handle differences between Swedish and Polish properties before you approve the move.

items.question: Can you help with packing an entire home before moving to Poland?
items.answer: Yes, our packing teams label boxes by room, protect fragile items extra carefully and pack for longer transport distances and move-in at Polish properties with older blokki or modern areas.

items.question: How does move-in work at Polish properties?
items.answer: We review gates, stairwells and elevators in advance where possible and adapt crew size and equipment to the property's conditions – whether it's older blokki in Warsaw with narrow stairs, modern areas in Kraków or older properties in Wrocław.

items.question: How far in advance should I book a move to/from Poland?
items.answer: For moves to and from Poland we recommend 4–6 weeks in advance, especially for larger projects or when longer distances and Polish property structures require extra planning. We always try to solve urgent requests where planning and transport make it possible.
